title: French Tagine Stuffed Dates
description: A unique twist on traditional French cuisine, this recipe combines the sweetness of dates with the savory flavors of a French tagine.
instructions: Pit the dates and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the tagine spice blend and softened butter.
Stuff each date with the butter mixture, followed by a sprinkle of bread crumbs and parmesan cheese.
Place the stuffed dates on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the bread crumbs are golden brown.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve warm.
